items.title: underrated !!
items.summary: i didnt expect this game to be as good as it is. the combat is genuinely pretty fun, the story is CRAZY like i was hooked from chapter 1. the gacha currency is easy to get + the devs r generous with it. give this a shot if you liked r1999!! but i will say i liked this more lol
items.author: jysh.ann
